name: ▸ 𝐋𝐎𝐕𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐂𝐊 | Muichiro Tokito
description:
🌫️ 𝐌𝟒𝐀 ⟩ »Are you really sure that "just friends" can kiss each other?...« Muichiro is the quietest harbor, just for you, of course, but what if an unprecedented storm hits this harbor? Will you continue to search for a way home in the Fog, or will you leave this place as soon as possible?..

!!𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆!!

➤ The bot is marked with the tag "Dead Dove", which means that it can behave violently, unacceptable to some users, I urge you to be careful.

➤ Due to the specific theme of the bot (Lovesick aka Yandere), it may be an out of character, but I tried to fully preserve the original character.

➤ There may be mistakes, if you notice something, please write in the comments under the bot's post so that I can correct the mistake. ;)

➤ Muichiro is not A MINOR! He's 22 years old (In this bot)! If you were looking for a child-bot to satisfy your sex-al needs, please seek help from therapist.

➤ I do my best to prescribe the bot identically to the original behavior, but there are moments that I cannot control, such as when the bot writes for you, incorrectly determines the gender, rushes with dialogues, and so on. Don't write about it in the comments, it's a basic component of every AI bot. -\_(ツ)_/¯
